user_prompt: Log into the GST portal at https://gst.gov.in. Fetch the username via secret(name='GST_TEST_USERNAME') and password via secret(name='GST_TEST_PASSWORD') from inside your code execution — do NOT echo them to chat. The login page has a CAPTCHA: take a screenshot of the captcha image and pass it to vision(task='captcha') to solve it. After submitting, take one final screenshot showing the post-login state. The hard cap is 2 captcha attempts — if both fail, stop, mark the step failed, and call report() explaining the lockout risk. Confirm whether you reached the dashboard.

behavior_checks.desc: Reached gst.gov.in either by navigate() OR by switch_tab() to an existing tab
Called observe() after the initial navigation
Fetched both creds via secret(), never via clarify or chat echo
Called vision(task='captcha') with the captcha image
Re-observed at least once AFTER typing the username (page state change)
Called report() with a final summary

outcome_check.verifier_prompt: Look at the final screenshot. Did the agent successfully reach the GST portal post-login state (e.g. dashboard, returns page, taxpayer profile)? Pass = clearly logged in. Fail = still on login page, captcha error visible, or any other not-logged-in state.

notes: This eval drives a real login. Run sparingly to avoid account lockout. Set GST_TEST_USERNAME + GST_TEST_PASSWORD in backend/.env first.
